name: C-4 --append writes a JSON line to .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl with the event and actor fields
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/audit-log.sh" --append --event login --actor user-1 --data '{}' && [ -s .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl ] && grep -q '"event":"login"' .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl && grep -q '"actor":"user-1"' .claude-tdd-pro/audit.jsonl && echo appended 1>&2
